title: Production Ready V1 theme for PipeSync
description:
New selectable theme in the site menu: Production Ready V1. It polishes PipeSync appearance (typography, panels, tabs, Plan Sync, Plan View, modals) and adds first-time-friendly page guides and tooltips — without changing any core behavior. Switch themes anytime from the dropdown; other themes are unaffected.

Also includes prior fixes: Plan Sync saved groups (select, Edit/Delete header), removed blue edit banner, download HUD overlay.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Production Ready V1 theme — polished UI + guided hints in site menu Theme dropdown.
Page guides on planner, Plan View, footage, reports, contacts, email, import queue.
Tooltips and field hints on key buttons and forms when theme is active.
Plan Sync saved groups: click-to-select, Edit/Delete header, green highlight.
Removed redundant blue Plan Sync edit banner.
